currentState.summary: R95 complete — Final validation. GPT-5.2 judge on 80 behavioral scenarios: B-avg 6.62, Safety 93.7%. 3 regression fixes applied. Profiling + host-triangle evals in progress (resume-supported).

nextSteps.description: Resume profiling eval (10/56 done) and host-triangle eval (10/30 done) — use `python3 -m tests.evaluation.v2.cli run --category profiling --all` and `--category host-triangle --all`
Run GPT-5.2 judge on profiling + host-triangle results: `python3 tests/evaluation/run_r95_judge.py --category profiling` and `--category host-triangle`
Optional: Add Grok 4 as second judge for ICC calculation

changes: S8: patron_privacy regex — (?!there\b) negative lookahead prevents 'Is there anything...' overmatch
S11: greeting_node domain cycling — marks suggested domain as explored to prevent repeat
Farewell close signals — 9 gratitude patterns for profile-aware goodbye
run_r95_judge.py — standalone judge script for v2-results
